steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: The word “nevertheless” marks a contradiction: Israel is brave and daring, yet he “evinced, throughout many parts of his career, a singular patience and mildness” — a passivity appearing right before he is forced to abandon his farm without aggressive pursuit.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content:
B states directly that Israel's mildness is what made him so easy to thwart; without it, he might have pursued his claim more aggressively.

The others misread the passage's focus — treating mildness as a physical inability (C), valuing it as a personal strength (A), or emphasizing courage instead of passivity (D).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
